creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 152316
The net/xrdesktop2 port files.

net/xrdesktop2
The GTK2-Perl version of net/xrdesktop. This is a replacement,
as neither the source, maintainer, nor WWW are available for
net/xrdesktop.

Xrdesktop2 is a GTK2-Perl frontend for Rdesktop, which allows for the
saving, and editing of session configurations.

Xrdesktop2's intent is to handle Rdesktop's available commandline options,
by presenting them in a [Perl/GTK2] GUI. Xrdesktop2 currently handles most
any of the options you're likely to be interested in. Future versions will
undoubtedly add more.

Please find xrdesktop2.shar attached, for the required source.
Please also find a complete log, for all the necessary QA details.

Thank you for all your time, and conideration.

--Chris
